\tzpentry{ID4290}{Wavefunction Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4290 introduces Wavefunction Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mathbf{p}(\hat{\mathbf{n}},\psi,\chi)= \cos\chi\hat{\mathbf{p}}_1 + i\sin\chi\hat{\mathbf{p}}_2$
\]
